response.justification: Maria has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and systems, including significant work with distributed systems, cloud technologies (AWS CDK), and leadership in open-source projects. However, her background in C++ is limited to early roles (National Instruments) and does not meet the 8-year requirement. Her leadership experience is strong but lacks direct technical leadership in cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as specified in the preferred qualifications.
strengths: Proven leadership in open-source and technical mentorship through workshops and talks
Strong experience with distributed systems, cloud technologies (AWS CDK), and large-scale infrastructure
Diverse technical background across multiple languages (C++, D, JavaScript/TypeScript) and systems
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience (only ~1.5 years in early career) to meet the 8-year minimum requirement
Lacks direct experience in cloud compute platform leadership or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers
Limited alignment with the specific role requirements for a technical lead in an internal cloud compute platform
